span.p:
Soft-delete cascade:
When User.is_active=false,
all Entries & Photos become inaccessible

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Constraint: 1 ≤ photos ≤ MAX_CONFIG
Soft-delete cascade:
When Entry.is_active=false,
all Photos become inaccessible

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Validation:
- Format: JPEG, PNG, WebP
- Max size: 10 MB (configurable)
- Max per Entry: config-driven
